operator_name_not_separately_identified_: 高速神奈川7号横浜北西線
route_name_comparison.limitation: This proves a current naming mismatch only. It does not by itself prove that the corresponding source geometry is present or absent.

observations: The operator identifies the linked full Navi Map as current on 2026-07-01.
The MLIT context dataset predates the operator map and therefore cannot alone establish current navigable coverage.
The operator map was reviewed as an external currentness reference only and is not copied into the repository or generated presentation.
The operator route-mark table lists 26 route names, while the context source exposes 25 unique route-name strings and does not separately identify 高速神奈川7号横浜北西線.
No automated segment-by-segment geometry, direction, entrance, exit, or legal-junction-movement reconciliation has been completed.
